title: thymus serpyllum var. nitidus
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. nitidus, also known as Creeping Thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Creeping Thyme include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in digestion. Creeping Thyme can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
